caption: A man with a shaved head, dark beard, and tattoos on his right arm is seated in a recording studio against a dark, ribbed acoustic foam wall. He wears large black over-ear headphones and a white t-shirt featuring the handwritten text "Stay Humble". A professional silver condenser microphone on a shock mount is positioned directly in front of him. Throughout the sequence, the man is smiling and laughing, shifting his gaze slightly while maintaining a cheerful expression. His mouth is open in a laugh in the beginning, and he transitions into a softer smile as he looks toward someone or something off-camera to his right. The camera angle remains static, focusing on his upper body and the recording equipment, while his facial expressions evolve from an active laugh to a contented grin.
